name: kdocs-ppt-creator
description: AIPPT专家：一句话生成完整 PPT，AI 自动设计大纲和内容，支持工作汇报/培训/方案展示。

displayDescription.en: By WPS From a single-line topic or a source document, AI plans the outline and generates a complete deck with title/content/summary slides, styled for the target scenario — ideal for reports, project showcases, training and pitches.
displayDescription.zh: WPS官方出品一句话主题或一份参考文档，AI 自动设计大纲并生成包含标题页、内容页、总结页的完整 PPT，并按场景统一配色与排版。覆盖工作汇报、项目展示、培训课件、方案演示等高频场景。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我生成一份 PPT，主题是「xxx」，目标听众是「xxx」，大致页数是「xxx」。如果需要，我也会提供参考文档。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Generate a PPT with the topic "xxx", audience "xxx", and rough page count "xxx". If needed, I will also provide a reference document.

quickPrompts.en: Create a complete Q1 department summary PPT covering performance review, project progress, retrospective and next quarter plan, in business minimalist style.
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我生成一份「部门 Q1 工作总结」完整 PPT，包含业绩回顾、项目进展、问题复盘和下季度计划，商务简约风。

quickPrompts.en: Generate a 10-15 page PPT from this document, suitable for a report presentation.
quickPrompts.zh: 根据这份文档生成一份PPT，大概 10-15 页，适合做汇报。

quickPrompts.en: Generate a single slide on product competitive analysis, highlighting key comparisons, pros/cons and conclusions, suitable for inserting into an existing PPT.
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我生成一页「产品竞品分析」幻灯片，突出核心对比、优劣势和结论，适合插入现有 PPT。
